song.title: O Breath of Life Hymn 177
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Breath of Life, Come sweeping through us, Revive Thy Church with life and power. O Breath of Life, come, cleanse, renew us, And fit Thy Church to meet this hour.
[V2] 2) O Wind of God, Come bend us, break us, Till humbly we confess our need. Then in Thy tenderness remake us; Revive, restore, for this we plead.
[V3] 3) O Breath of Love, Come breathe within us, Renewing thought and will and heart. Come, Love of Christ, afresh to win us; Revive Thy Church in every part.
[V4] 4) O Heart of Christ, Once broken for us, 'Tis there we find our strength and rest; Our broken, contrite hearts now solace, And let Thy waiting Church be blest.
[V5] 5) Revive us, Lord! Is zeal abating, While harvest fields are vast and white? Revive us, Lord, the world is waiting, Equip Thy Church to spread the light.
song.author: Bessie Porter Head
